cluster_id.description: The unique identifier of the cluster.

cluster_name.description: The human-readable name of the cluster.

spark_version.description: The runtime version of the cluster.

node_type_id.description: The node type for worker nodes.

driver_node_type_id.description: The node type for the Spark driver.

state.description: The current state of the cluster.

state_message.description: A message about the state of the cluster.

start_time.description: The time the cluster was started in epoch milliseconds.

terminated_time.description: The time the cluster was terminated in epoch milliseconds.

last_state_loss_time.description: The time when the cluster driver last lost its state in epoch milliseconds.

last_activity_time.description: The time of the last user activity on the cluster.

last_restarted_time.description: The time the cluster was last restarted.

creator_user_name.description: The email of the user who created the cluster.

cluster_source.description: The source that created the cluster.

jdbc_port.description: Port on the driver for JDBC/ODBC connections.
